extraction.one_line_summary: LUTSENKO Alexey won the 16.4km ITT by catching both his 2-minute men, nearly taking yellow from POSTELBERGER who held on by 1 second.
tactical_patterns: LUTSENKO caught both 2-minute men in ITT, only rider shown doing so, indicating massive negative splits capability.
THOMAS Geraint fastest at 7.5km intermediate but lost 23s to LUTSENKO in second half, suggesting technical descent weakness.
MCNULTY Brandon first to beat VINGEGAARD's time at intermediate check, placing 8th overall shows climbing TT strength.

rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: Won despite never being spectacular in WT ITTs, catching two 2-minute men suggests peaking form
rider_signals.POSTELBERGER Lukas: positive: Held yellow by 1s against specialists PORT/THOMAS/KELDERMAN despite being sprinter type, unexpected TT resilience
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Led at intermediate but lost 23s to LUTSENKO in technical second half, slower than teammate PORT
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: 40s down at 7.5km check on ITT, confirms continued post-injury weakness in specialty discipline
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: First sub-22min rider, beat specialists early before MCNULTY/LUTSENKO, signals emerging ITT strength
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: Beat VINGEGAARD at intermediate, 8th overall on lumpy technical course shows all-rounder development
